title: Happy Mother's Day Balloons - 8Pcs 18inch Mothers Day Decorations Foil Balloons Round Colorful Foil Helium Balloon for Mother's Day Birthday Party Decorations
features: Material: Made of aluminum foil, durable and reusable, not easy to break. Blow up evenly and seal tightly when inflated.

Exquisite Design: Happy mothers heart balloons are printed with a lot of beautiful flowers patterns, with bright colors, which are charming and conspicuous; The text is simple and warm, suitable for dressing up for Mother's Day.
Quantity and Style: You will get 8 pieces mothers day balloons decorations with 4 styles, 2 pieces of each styles; the size of the balloons is 18 inch, large and enough quantity to decorate party.

Easy to Use: After inflating, you only need to pinch the opening of the balloon and glue it. It will seal automatically, which is very convenient to use. You can directly let them float to the ceiling or stick them on the walls and windows.

Celebration Occasions: As ornaments to decorate Mother's Day parties, mama themed parties, birthday parties and others to create a sweet atmosphere; They can also be applied as photo background or photo props, helping you and your family leave beautiful pictures.
